title: notifications-in-app — health probes
description: Two probes. The primary probe is Reverb reachability; the secondary is broadcast throughput.

probes.name: notifications-in-app-reverb-reachable
probes.description: Reverb HTTP admin API responds within timeout. Non-critical — in-app writes still succeed when Reverb is down; live updates degrade to poll-on-refresh.

probes.name: notifications-in-app-broadcast-lag
probes.description: P95 broadcast dispatch → client-ack latency over the last minute. Warns > 500ms; fails > 2000ms. Non-critical.
